headline: Supreme Court to hear case that could limit pesticide liability — and divide MAHA from Trump
snapshot: On Monday, the Supreme Court will hear arguments in a case that could curtail antipesticide lawsuits — an issue that pits the Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) movement against the Trump administration. The high court agreed to take up the case earlier this...
